nodes.label: Sanad Arabic RTL Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.description: Full-page screenshot of the Sanad app dashboard rendered in Arabic (RTL) layout. Shows the main dashboard (لوحة التحكم) with greeting 'مساء الخير، أحمد' and dual-calendar date (Gregorian + Hijri). The UI is fully right-to-left with Arabic labels throughout. Key UI sections: urgent cases count (1), expiring compliance items (4, >30 days), overdue tasks (1), active cases (6), open tasks (9), today's billing hours (1,275 SAR), focus hours (3h45m). Right-side navigation includes Dashboard, Compliance (badge:4), Cases Board, Deep Work, Tasks (badge:9), Documents. The daily digest panel shows news from Ministry of Justice, HR Ministry, and Zakat Authority. Today's priorities panel shows an NDA follow-up task. Compliance expiry panel lists 4 items with days remaining. Footer confirms 'PWA enabled, local server hosted'. App tagline: لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية (Daily Operations Dashboard for Lawyers and Small Businesses in Saudi Arabia).
